title: duvernoia extensa
intro: Duvernoia extensa is a plant species native to tropical Africa, also known as 'Red Gold' or 'Dwarf Fireweed', and is part of the Acanthaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Duvernoia extensa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat wounds and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Duvernoia extensa include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
